objective: Corrective attempt 2/3 for B4-B. Reimplement the exact Section 3.1 inventory binding from clean protected main and close the two independently observed v1 root causes: use the first Role cell, not the repository-link label, as the registry label join key; and detect wrong-level or suffixed 3.1 headings before deciding that the exact section is missing. Preserve every v1 structural, whole-row link, immutable snapshot and documentation invariant. Do not copy the failed candidate blindly. No CLI, no filesystem presentation, no product or workflow changes. Claude Code OAuth only; no paid API fallback.

corrective_root_causes.evidence: the candidate assigned the Markdown repository-link label to plan_label and queried registry_by_label with owner/repository although registry_by_label is keyed by the first-column human label
corrective_root_causes.consequence: canonical input and every downstream field mutation collapsed incorrectly to plan_label_set_mismatch; duplicate Role cells were not detected
corrective_root_causes.required_fix: parse role_cell separately; use its exact text as plan_label, duplicate-tracking value and registry_by_label lookup key; extract repository link label separately as plan_full_name and compare it to registry full_name

corrective_root_causes.evidence: the candidate discovered only lines starting with the literal ### 3.1, so a #### 3.1 mutation returned plan_section_missing before the wrong-level check
corrective_root_causes.required_fix: classify exact, wrong-level and suffixed variants from complete heading lines before returning plan_section_missing; wrong level must deterministically return plan_section_wrong_level

corrective_root_causes.evidence: the v1 candidate used str.islower(), which rejects an otherwise valid 40-character lowercase-hex snapshot containing digits only
corrective_root_causes.consequence: potential false rejection not yet exposed by the v1 suite
corrective_root_causes.required_fix: validate the unquoted SHA cell with fullmatch [0-9a-f]{40}; add a digits-only 40-character positive regression

prior_adversarial_evidence.observed_failure: test_plan_url_mismatch accepted a mutated repository URL
prior_adversarial_evidence.reuse_policy: design and adversarial evidence only; rejected code must not be copied blindly

production_api_exact.registry_argument: the supplied stage A registry is authoritative and must actually be used

governed_section_exact.heading: ### 3.1 Verified names and boundaries
governed_section_exact.heading_match: one exact full line at Markdown level 3
governed_section_exact.header: | Role | Canonical repository | Visibility | `main` SHA | Boundary |
governed_section_exact.repository_link_scan_scope: complete raw row before any cells are discarded
governed_section_exact.section_termination: the next Markdown heading of level 1, 2 or 3 or end of document

expected_inventory_rows.boundary: owns governance, schemas, reusable workflows and evidence contracts
owns the minimal downstream skeleton and repeatability tests
owns the automated agentic software-development platform runtime and platform delivery

identity_binding.join_key: exact first Role cell equals registry label
identity_binding.repository_link_label: separate plan_full_name compared to registry full_name; never used as registry label join key
identity_binding.main_sha_rule: strip exactly one surrounding backtick pair, then regex-fullmatch lowercase [0-9a-f]{40}; SHA is an immutable plan snapshot and is not added to the registry

required_production_regressions: the exact committed execution plan and exact committed registry return an empty list
missing exact section returns plan_section_missing
two exact headings return plan_section_duplicate
#### 3.1 Verified names and boundaries returns exactly plan_section_wrong_level
the exact level-3 heading plus any suffix returns exactly plan_section_heading_suffix
mutated or extra header column returns plan_header_mismatch
mutated separator returns plan_separator_mismatch
missing, extra, duplicated and substituted rows each assert a specific code
every raw data row with fewer or more than five cells returns plan_row_column_count_mismatch
a sixth ordinary cell or a sixth rogue repository-link cell cannot pass
repository-link count is computed over the complete raw row before cells are discarded
a repository link outside the second cell returns plan_repository_link_outside_repository_cell
repository link label mutation returns plan_full_name_mismatch
repository URL mutation returns plan_url_mismatch
Role-cell duplication returns plan_duplicate_label
visibility mutation returns plan_visibility_mismatch
uppercase, non-hex and non-40-character SHA values return plan_main_sha_invalid
a digits-only 40-character SHA is accepted structurally
boundary mutation returns plan_boundary_mismatch
supplied registry label, URL, visibility and boundary mutations each prove the registry argument is used with a specific code
non-dict registry, missing canonical_repositories and non-list canonical_repositories return registry_input_invalid
non-string plan input returns plan_input_invalid

documentation_change_exact.only_changed_line: the third Section 3.1 inventory data row
